_comment: Feature 027 (bug-reporter) signature fixtures. Consumed by Lua bug_reporter.signature (T002/T008) and TS bug-reporter-worker/src/signature.ts (T020/T040). Both implementations MUST produce identical hashes. Hashes hand-computed via python3 hashlib (see scripts/recompute_signature_vectors.py).
_formula: sig = sha256(sig_input_commands + '|' + sig_input_text); sig_input_commands = last_3_commands.reject(c=='ReportBug').join(','); sig_input_text = capture_type=='automatic' ? normalize_error(error_message) : normalize_title(user_description). Per data-model.md §Signature, FR-012.

vectors.name: B_user_clusters_with_A
vectors._cluster_invariant: MUST match A's expected_sig — normalize_title strips punctuation+case so the same root cause clusters.

vectors.name: C_auto_path_normalized
vectors._normalization: Absolute path matching /[A-Za-z0-9_./\-]+\.[a-z]+ stripped; trailing colon retained (not in strip rules); lowercase + collapse whitespace + trim.

vectors.name: D_auto_hex_id_normalized
vectors.error_message: Texture handle 0xdeadbeefcafe not found in cache 1234567890abcdef
vectors.sig_input_canonical: RenderFrame,ApplyEffect,Composite|texture handle not found in cache
vectors._normalization: 0x-prefixed hex AND standalone hex of length >= 16 both stripped per data-model.md §Signature normalize_error.

vectors.name: E_reportbug_trailing_stripped
vectors._cluster_invariant: Trailing ReportBug filtered before join — F12 must not dominate cluster space (FR-012).

vectors.name: F_fewer_than_three_commands
vectors._edge_case: Fresh launch — fewer than 3 prior commands; join just emits what's there.
